# Pinned OGC GeoSPARQL 1.1 auxiliary RDF sources

The Turtle files in this directory are unmodified snapshots from the official
Open Geospatial Consortium repository:

- repository: `https://github.com/opengeospatial/ogc-geosparql`
- published tag: `1.1.0-ghpages`
- commit: `cd53678be2e9775066d63791c84c3fa010fc29ff`
- upstream directory: `geosparql11/`

Pinned SHA-256 digests:

- `reqs.ttl`: `209fd99a08ea9a1992ab5bbbfe68193e0183c44e59c626e276379d2007298bfd`
- `servicedescription_conformanceclasses.ttl`: `58fa4b6e7d1991522c2d9c7728a3d02478f91a1bbfdac7f7cb3eecbc6d7fe6dc`

The files retain their upstream copyright and licensing metadata, including
the OGC rights and license statements embedded in `reqs.ttl`. They are vendored
only to make source-integrity and inventory audits reproducible.

These files are auxiliary semantic registers. They are neither an executable
OGC Executable Test Suite nor a replacement for normative Annex A of OGC
22-047r1.
